steps.t: Return the supplies to Thurferth, near the centre of Woodhurst. Guard Captain Thurferth will be thankful for these supplies.
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farmhouse. You should bring the ill news of the mismanagement of the city's monies, as it may help explain why the s…
Elda has not been seen since the council-meeting, but he should be somewhere in Woodhurst. You need to speak with Elda about the funding for the guard…
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farmhouse. Herubrand should know what Elda had to say about the funds for the city guards.
Guard-captain Thurferth is near the centre of the city. You should return to Guard-captain Thurferth and inform him of the misplacement of funding tha…
